type.name: Poster
type.desc: The owner and producer of one or more galleries
type.field: The poster's user id
The url to the primary page of the poster's galleries.
W (whitelisted), B (blacklisted) or G (no decision yet, default) indicating crawl priorities for newly posted galleries.

type.name: Gallery
type.desc: A collection of images posted by a user and linked to by some number of gallery pages
type.field: The gallery id
The poster's user name
The gallery name
The url of the gallery page
|-separated list of gallery categories and tags
Number of images in the gallerys
Number of pages in the gallery
Number of gallery pages that have been processed
Image size. One of S, M, L, XL
When this gallery was added to the site (or modified) in yyyy-mm-dd format

Process state for crawl. One of ID(entified as new from gallery page results list), NA(vigating through all of its gallery pages), SA (sample images downloaded, pending approval for continued crawling), IN(ventoried after completing crawl of all gallery pages), KG (keep gallery) or NI (no interest)

type.name: Image
type.field: The image page id
The gallery id
The url of the image page
The image id. Should be the same as the id of the image page that displays the image
The url of the image
The local file name (not the absolute path) of the image
A user-provided ranking of the image. unscored: -1; poor:0; ok: 1; good:2
Process state for crawl. One of GP (image discovered on gallery page), IP (information gathered from image page), DL (image downloaded)

type.name: GalleryAttr
type.desc: A string indicating the subject matter or context of the images in a gallery. It can be used to automatically prioritize crawl navigation
type.field: The attribute itself.
Whether there is a bias in favor of galleries ("+"), a bias against ("-"), no bias (" ") with this attribute, or "?" if not yet scored
An additive to strength the score for this attribute

type.name: Caption
type.desc: A caption to be associated with an image. An image may have multiple captions.
type.field: The unique caption id.
The image id. May not be a unique value in this table.
The text of the caption
